book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: \+w Judge\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w judged\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w judgment\+w* \+w ye judge\+w*, \+w ye shall be judged\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w measure\+w* \+w ye mete\+w*, \+w it shall be measured\+w* \+w to you\+w* \+w again\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w why\+w* \+w beholdest thou\+w* \+w the mote\+w* \+w that is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother’s\+w* \+w eye\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w considerest\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w the beam\+w* that is \+w in\+w* \+w thine own\+w* \+w eye\+w*?

\+w Or\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w wilt thou say\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w*, \+w Let\+w* \+w me pull out\+w* \+w the mote\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w eye\+w*; \+w and\+w*, \+w behold\+w*, \+w a beam\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w thine own\+w* \+w eye\+w*?

\+w Thou hypocrite\+w*, \+w first\+w* \+w cast out\+w* \+w the beam\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thine own\+w* \+w eye\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shalt thou see clearly\+w* \+w to cast out\+w* \+w the mote\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother’s\+w* \+w eye\+w*.

¶ \+w Give\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w that which is holy\+w* \+w unto the dogs\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w cast ye\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w pearls\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w swine\+w*, \+w lest\+w* \+w they trample\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w under\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w feet\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w turn again and\+w* \+w rend\+w* \+w you\+w*.
¶ \+w Ask\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w it shall be given\+w* \+w you\+w*; \+w seek\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye shall find\+w*; \+w knock\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w it shall be opened\+w* \+w unto you\+w*:
\+w For\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one that asketh\+w* \+w receiveth\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w he that seeketh\+w* \+w findeth\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w to him that knocketh\+w* \+w it shall be opened\+w*.

\+w Or\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w is there\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w ask\+w* \+w bread\+w*, \+w will he give\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w a stone\+w*?
\+w Or\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he ask\+w* \+w a fish\+w*, \+w will he give\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w a serpent\+w*?

\+w If\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w then\+w*, \+w being\+w* \+w evil\+w*, \+w know how\+w* \+w to give\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w gifts\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w children\+w*, \+w how much\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w give\+w* \+w good things\+w* \+w to them that\+w* \+w ask\+w* \+w him\+w*?

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w ye would\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w should do\+w* \+w to you\+w*, \+w do\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w to them\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the law\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*.

¶ \+w Enter ye\+w* \+w in at\+w* \+w the strait\+w* \+w gate\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w wide\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w the gate\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w broad\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w the way\+w*, \+w that leadeth\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w destruction\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w there be\+w* \+w which go in\+w* \+w thereat\+w*:

\+w Because\+w* \+w strait\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w the gate\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w narrow\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w the way\+w*, \+w which leadeth\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w life\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w few\+w* \+w there be\+w* \+w that find\+w* \+w it\+w*.

¶ \+w Beware\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w false prophets\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w sheep’s\+w* \+w clothing\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w inwardly\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w ravening\+w* \+w wolves\+w*.

\+w Ye shall know\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w fruits\+w*. \+w Do\+w* \+w men gather\+w* \+w grapes\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thorns\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w figs\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thistles\+w*?

\+w Even so\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w tree\+w* \+w bringeth forth\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w fruit\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w a corrupt\+w* \+w tree\+w* \+w bringeth forth\+w* \+w evil\+w* \+w fruit\+w*.

\+w A good\+w* \+w tree\+w* \+w cannot\+w* \+w bring forth\+w* \+w evil\+w* \+w fruit\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+add can\+add* \+w a corrupt\+w* \+w tree\+w* \+w bring forth\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w fruit\+w*.
\+w Every\+w* \+w tree\+w* \+w that bringeth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w forth\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w fruit\+w* \+w is hewn down\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the fire\+w*.
\+w Wherefore\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w fruits\+w* \+w ye shall know\+w* \+w them\+w*.

¶ \+w Not\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one that saith\+w* \+w unto me\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w shall enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w he that doeth\+w* \+w the will\+w* \+w of my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.

\+w Many\+w* \+w will say\+w* \+w to me\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w day\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w have we\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w prophesied\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w*? \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w have cast out\+w* \+w devils\+w*? \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w done\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w wonderful works\+w*?
\+w And\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w will I profess\+w* \+w unto them\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w never\+w* \+w knew\+w* \+w you\+w*: \+w depart\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w ye that work\+w* \+w iniquity\+w*.

¶ \+w Therefore\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w heareth\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w sayings\+w* \+w of mine\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w doeth\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w I will liken\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w unto a\+w* \+w wise\+w* \+w man\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w built\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w a rock\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w the rain\+w* \+w descended\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the floods\+w* \+w came\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the winds\+w* \+w blew\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w beat upon\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w house\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w it fell\+w* \+w not\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w it was founded\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w a rock\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one that heareth\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w sayings\+w* \+w of mine\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w doeth\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w shall be likened\+w* \+w unto a\+w* \+w foolish\+w* \+w man\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w built\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the sand\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w the rain\+w* \+w descended\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the floods\+w* \+w came\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the winds\+w* \+w blew\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w beat upon\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w house\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w it fell\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w the fall\+w* \+w of it\+w*.
And it came to pass, when Jesus had ended these sayings, the people were astonished at his doctrine:
For he taught them as one having authority, and not as the scribes.
